videos.headline: Oregon's Kenyon Sadiq hurdles defender for unreal TD
videos.description: Kenyon Sadiq leaps over the defender to score first for Oregon against Penn State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon's Kenyon Sadiq hurdles defender for unreal TD) 2024/12/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel's 4 TDs lead Oregon past Penn State for Big Ten title
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel shines with four touchdown passes as Oregon claims the Big Ten championship over Penn State.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Dillon Gabriel's 4 TDs lead Oregon past Penn State for Big Ten title) 2024/12/08 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Dontae Manning's interception sets up Ducks' TD
videos.description: Dontae Manning's pick brings the Ducks to the 1-yard line, setting up a quick score to extend their lead over Penn State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dontae Manning's interception sets up Ducks' TD) 2024/12/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel's 4th TD pass finds Tez Johnson for 48-yard score
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel finds Tez Johnson deep for a 48-yard touchdown as Oregon keeps rolling.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel's 4th TD pass finds Tez Johnson for 48-yard score) 2024/12/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Penn State closes the gap with 14 unanswered points
videos.description: Drew Allar orchestrates two straight Penn State touchdown drives as the Nittany Lions fight back into the game in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Penn State closes the gap with 14 unanswered points) 2024/12/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan James punches his 2nd TD for Oregon
videos.description: Jordan James extends Oregon's lead in the fourth quarter with a 3-yard rushing TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan James punches his 2nd TD for Oregon) 2024/12/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon seals Big Ten title on Nikko Reed's sensational INT
videos.description: Drew Allar's heave gets picked off by Nikko Reed to seal Oregon's Big Ten Championship win.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon seals Big Ten title on Nikko Reed's sensational INT) 2024/12/08 ESHEET
